ham: Hi Rajesh, a broadband engineer Dr. Sharma will visit your home on 25th April at 10 AM to troubleshoot your connection. Please make sure the router is powered on and the area is clear. Let us know if you need to reschedule. Thanks!
spam: Yours package with tracking #12345 was missed. Please click <URL> to reschedule or pay $10 late fee. Urgent. Offer ends 15 min.
